rows.notes: Very clear centered heading. Ink and letters are legible and there are no amounts on this line.

Year at left ('1800') is clear. The addressee line is legible enough to read as 'Messrs' and a three-part name but the exact spelling of the surnames (Briddulph / Cochrn / Ridge) is somewhat uncertain due to flourished handwriting; no amounts on this line.

Amount at right clearly reads '19.3.0'. Description mostly legible as 'Dividend on 1421' followed by a short notation; the parenthetical abbreviation is partially stylized ('Q.T.D' or similar) so transcribed conservatively. Columns aligned by the vertical rules; shillings and pence are within valid ranges.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend received on 1421 consols, amounting to £19 3s 0d.

rows.notes: Numeric amount '9.16.6' is clear and fits column alignment. The descriptive text begins with the common abbreviation 'Do' (ditto) and 'on 546' is readable; the remainder of the description is partly abbreviated/obscure ('9 4 pr'lt') so transcription of that fragment is uncertain.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend received on 546 consols, amounting to £9 16s 6d.

rows.notes: Amount at right reads as '19.3.8' with clear alignment to the pounds/shillings/pence columns. Description follows same pattern as previous 'Do on 1421' and ends 'as before' which is legible.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend received on 1421 consols, amounting to £19 3s 8d.

rows.notes: Amount again clearly '9.16.6'. Description is largely legible as 'Do on 546' though the trailing dash/abbreviation is faint; numeric columns are well aligned and values are valid.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend received on 546 consols, amounting to £9 16s 6d.

rows.notes: A short dash marks this line; a right-hand total is written as '58-4' (interpreted as 58 pounds, 4 shillings, 0 pence). The handwriting of the total is fainter and slightly offset from the item lines; the total does not arithmetically match the four preceding printed amounts if interpreted strictly, so there is some uncertainty whether the total represents a rounding, an additional hidden item, or a different grouping—transcribed exactly as shown.

rows.description: State of the Fund for Advowsons in the 3d per Cent reduced
rows.notes: Section heading is legible though written in a cursive style; no amounts on this header. The phrase '3d per Cent' is read as '3d per Cent' (three per cent) and 'reduced' is visible at line end.
rows.section_header: State of the Fund for Advowsons in the 3d per Cent reduced

rows.description: Amount of stock pr last account
rows.notes: Right-hand numeric cluster reads clearly as '2476.18.7' and aligns with the £/s/d columns. Description 'Amount of stock pr last account' is readable though small; all currency components are within valid ranges.
rows.section_header: State of the Fund for Advowsons in the 3d per Cent reduced
rows.english_description: Amount of stock per last account for the Advowsons fund (3% reduced).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Amount of stock per last account for the Advowsons fund, amounting to £2476 18s 7d.

rows.notes: There are two related figures in this calculation area. The phrase 'with one years Div. 66.17.6' is legible but the numeric '99.8.10' appears on the same horizontal band slightly lower/right and is labeled by the writer as 'bought'. I have associated '99.8.10' with the 'bought' fragment. Handwriting of the descriptive linking text is somewhat cramped, making the exact line breaks uncertain; the numeric '99.8.10' itself is clear.
rows.section_header: State of the Fund for Advowsons in the 3d per Cent reduced
rows.english_description: One year's dividend applied to purchase stock (reinvested into the Advowsons fund).
rows.english_description_with_amount: One year's dividend applied to purchase stock, amounting to £99 8s 10d.

rows.notes: Final computed total for this block is clearly written as '2576.7.5' and underlined. The word 'making' precedes the total and is legible. Numeric columns align well and values are valid.
rows.section_header: State of the Fund for Advowsons in the 3d per Cent reduced

rows.description: N.B. Dividend civy 34.15.7 not yet invested
rows.notes: Final note begins with 'N.B.' and indicates a dividend '34.15.7' not yet invested; the number '34.15.7' is legible at the start of the line but the word immediately following the abbreviation looks like 'civy' or 'civy' (uncertain spelling). Placement of the numeric figure is close to the right columns; all numeric parts are within valid ranges.
rows.section_header: State of the Fund for Advowsons in the 3d per Cent reduced
rows.english_description: Note that a dividend of £34 15s 7d has not yet been invested.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Note that a dividend of £34 15s 7d has not yet been invested.
